TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Chile = Gaga kska Kska- Hunac Meycow ka Chile, 30 00 S, 71 00 W ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 756,102 sq km(hangan na o Tg38) (knlbanga dxgal o 743,812 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 12,290 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 17,650,114 hiyi. Gaga Santiago ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 18 idas 9 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Chile ga wada sugan 21.10% ka dxgal qpahan, 21.90% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 57% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Michelle Bachelet, pnaah hngkawas2014 idas 3 jiyax 11pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: = ʦħilə = gaga kska kska- ħunaʦ məʦow ka ʦħilə, ** ** s, ** ** w ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŋan na o ***,*** sq km(ħaŋan na o tg**) (knlbaŋa dxgal o ***,*** sq km, knlbaŋan qsija o **,*** sq km). kana ka səɟiqun o niqan **,***,*** ħiji. gaga santiago ka pusu alaŋ paɾu, ɟijax ** idas * ka ɟijax skɾajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal ʦħilə ga wada sugan **.**% ka dxgal qpaħan, **.**% ka dxgal bbuju, ɾaħuq dxgal do niqan **% na. bukuŋ klwaan ta sajaŋ o kija ka miʦħəllə baʦħələt, pnaaħ ħŋkawas**** idas * ɟijax **pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ʦinkħulan sa knita' sa bɾbiɾu'
S.FORM: = Chile = Gaga kska Kska- Hunac Meycow ka Chile, 30 00 S, 71 00 W ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 756,102 sq km(hangan na o Tg38) (knlbanga dxgal o 743,812 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 12,290 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 17,650,114 hiyi. Gaga Santiago ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 18 idas 9 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Chile ga wada sugan 21.10% ka dxgal qpahan, 21.90% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 57% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Michelle Bachelet, pnaah hngkawas2014 idas 3 jiyax 11pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: = ʦħilə = gaga kska kska- ħunaʦ məʦow ka ʦħilə, ** ** s, ** ** w ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŋan na o ***,*** sq km(ħaŋan na o tg**) (knlbaŋa dxgal o ***,*** sq km, knlbaŋan qsija o **,*** sq km). kana ka səɟiqun o niqan **,***,*** ħiji. gaga santiago ka pusu alaŋ paɾu, ɟijax ** idas * ka ɟijax skɾajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal ʦħilə ga wada sugan **.**% ka dxgal qpaħan, **.**% ka dxgal bbuju, ɾaħuq dxgal do niqan **% na. bukuŋ klwaan ta sajaŋ o kija ka miʦħəllə baʦħələt, pnaaħ ħŋkawas**** idas * ɟijax **pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ʦinkħulan sa knita' sa bɾbiɾu'
